prompt:
请帮我翻译这段技术文档：

Kubernetes is an open-source container orchestration platform that automates the deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications. It provides a robust framework for running distributed systems resiliently, allowing developers to declaratively manage application infrastructure through YAML configuration files. The platform handles service discovery, load balancing, and self-healing capabilities, making it the de facto standard for cloud-native application deployment.

assertions.name: 使用双语对照格式
assertions.description: 输出应包含'原文：'和'译文：'标记，清晰区分英文原文和中文翻译

assertions.name: 专业术语保留英文
assertions.description: Kubernetes、YAML、container等专业术语应保留英文原文，格式为'中文/English'

assertions.name: 长句已拆分
assertions.description: 原文中的长句（如第二句）应拆分成2-3个短句，每个短句不超过25个字

assertions.name: 译文自然流畅
assertions.description: 中文表达符合中文习惯，没有英文式的生硬翻译
